context: Tests whether the CallKit skill handles current PushKit VoIP metadata behavior and APNs invite settings.

checklist.name: Metadata delegate
checklist.description: Uses the iOS 26.4+ PKPushRegistryDelegate method with PKVoIPPushMetadata when available.

checklist.name: Must report semantics
checklist.description: Checks PKVoIPPushMetadata.mustReport and explains that false means the app is not required to report the push to CallKit or LiveCommunicationKit.

checklist.name: Older fallback
checklist.description: Keeps the older pushRegistry(_:didReceiveIncomingPushWith:for:completion:) path for iOS 26.0-26.3 or older deployment targets.

checklist.name: Required reporting
checklist.description: Reports required VoIP call pushes with CXProvider.reportNewIncomingCall before completing PushKit handling.

checklist.name: Failure consequences
checklist.description: Mentions that apps built with the iOS 13 SDK or later must use CallKit for PushKit VoIP calls and repeated report failures can stop VoIP push delivery.

checklist.name: Short expiration
checklist.description: Recommends apns-expiration 0 or only a few seconds for VoIP push requests.
